basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Patna
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Patna is recruiting 1 Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post on a purely temporary basis under ICMR project.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application. | Age Relaxation: As per ICMR / Government of India guidelines for SC/ST/OBC categories.

vacancy_details.details: Name of the Post: Project Research Scientist I (Medical) No. of Vacancy: 01 Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 67,000/- + 20% HRA

selection_process: Mode of Selection: Written Test + Interview (if eligible candidates >30) OR Interview only (if ≤30 candidates). Interview venue: Endoscopy Unit (C4B)
AIIMS Patna. Final selection subject to performance and approval of competent authority.
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit the completely filled application form in the prescribed format along with detailed CV, self-attested documents, and recent passport-size photograph.
Hard copy by post / by hand to: O/o Department of Gastroenterology, 4th Floor, Room No. 454, OPD Building, AIIMS Patna, Bihar – 801507
Email the scanned copy with all documents to: [email protected]
Photo ID (Aadhaar / PAN / Passport / Driving License)
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary project position. No claim for regular/permanent employment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates already in regular government service must submit NOC. Incomplete/late applications will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. AIIMS Patna reserves the right to cancel/modify the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Name of the Post: Project Research Scientist I (Medical) No. of Vacancy: 01 Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 67,000/- + 20% HRA

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application. Age Relaxation: As per ICMR / Government of India guidelines for SC/ST/OBC categories.

rows.details: 1. At least one research paper in SCI journal 2. Two years of experience in clinical research
Upper age limit 35 years (as on last date)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Mode of Selection: Written Test + Interview (if eligible candidates >30) OR Interview only (if ≤30 candidates). Interview venue: Endoscopy Unit (C4B), 4th Floor, IPD Building, Department of Gastroenterology, AIIMS Patna. Final selection subject to performance and approval of competent authority.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit the completely filled application form in the prescribed format along with detailed CV, self-attested documents, and recent passport-size photograph. Submission Method: Hard copy by post / by hand to: O/o Department of Gastroenterology, 4th Floor, Room No. 454, OPD Building, AIIMS Patna, Bihar – 801507 Email the scanned copy with all documents to: [email protected] Documents Required: Filled Application Form Detailed Bio-data / CV All educational certificates & marksheets (10th onwards) Experience certificates Age proof, Caste certificate (if applicable) Photo ID (Aadhaar / PAN / Passport / Driving License) Recent passport-size photograph

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary project position. No claim for regular/permanent employment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates already in regular government service must submit NOC. Incomplete/late applications will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. AIIMS Patna reserves the right to cancel/modify the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is within 15 days from the date of publication of the advertisement on the AIIMS Patna website.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Project Research Scientist I (Medical) at AIIMS Patna?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is BAMS (Bachelor in Ayurvedic Sciences). Candidates with research publications and clinical research experience will be preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist post?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive Rs. 67,000/- per month + 20% HRA (Rs. 13,400).

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS Patna ICMR Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for Project Research Scientist I (Medical).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 35 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation is applicable as per ICMR norms.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS Patna Gastroenterology Project vacancy?
faq.answer: Candidates must send the hard copy of the application by post/hand and also email the filled form with documents to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job in AIIMS Patna?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary project-based position initially for 6 months, extendable based on performance and project requirement.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist?
faq.answer: Selection will be done through Written Test + Interview (if more than 30 candidates) or Interview only.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the place of posting for this AIIMS Patna recruitment?
faq.answer: The place of posting is AIIMS Patna, Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this ICMR project at AIIMS Patna?
faq.answer: Dr. Ramesh Kumar, Professor & Head, Department of Gastroenterology, AIIMS Patna.
